description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by dense, tall evergreen trees. The house features a flat roof, a white and blue exterior, and a prominent front entryway with a brown door and circular window. A driveway leads to a garage, with a pink car parked in front, and a concrete walkway connects the driveway to the main entrance. Large windows are visible on the front and side, allowing natural light into the interior. The house is set in a forested environment, with the trees providing privacy and a natural backdrop. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and blue exterior, and a garage, surrounded by tall evergreen trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway with a pink car, and a clear view of the house's white and blue facade.
description_view_1: Rear view mostly obscured by trees, with the back of the house and part of the flat roof visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the entryway and garage partially visible between tall trees, emphasizing the house's width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue side wall and the pink car at the edge, with dense trees surrounding the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front and side
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a brown door with a circular window, accessed by a concrete walkway, and is adjacent to the garage.
